summary: Verified Spotify deep-link fix on Hive feed cards. All tests passing: login works, Hive feed loads correctly, NOW_SPINNING cards display Spotify icons with proper green (#1DB954) color indicating matched albums, all icons link directly to Spotify album pages (not search), and no React/Hook console errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Line 14-50 in PostCards.js: StreamingLinks component correctly places React hooks (useAuth, useState, useEffect) before the early return statement, fixing the rules-of-hooks violation
Line 367-368: discogsId prop is now correctly passed as `discogsId={record.discogs_id || post.discogs_id}` to StreamingLinks component in NowSpinningCard
Backend /api/spotify/link/{discogs_id} endpoint correctly resolves Discogs IDs to Spotify album URLs with matched=true status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spotify deep-link feature verified working. Hive feed NOW_SPINNING cards show green Spotify icons linking directly to albums. Backend endpoint /api/spotify/link/{discogs_id} returns matched=true with direct album URLs.

tests_performed.result: PASS - Returns matched=true with spotify_url='https://open.spotify.com/album/3iPSVi54hsacKKl1xIR2eH' for Sabrina Carpenter
PASS - Login with provided credentials redirects to /hive
PASS - Feed loads with 8 NOW_SPINNING cards visible
PASS - 8 Spotify icons found with data-testid='spotify-link'

tests_performed.test: Spotify icons turn green on match
tests_performed.result: PASS - All 8 icons have computed fill=rgb(29,185,84) which is #1DB954 green

tests_performed.test: Spotify links are direct album URLs
tests_performed.result: PASS - All 8 icons link to open.spotify.com/album/... (not search pages)
PASS - No hook-related errors in browser console
